case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. VS. AMANDA L DARUS

docket_entries.description: LAW & MOTION, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE FEB-02-2021 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A.'S MOTION TO ENTER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. MOTION GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ORDER SIGNED. SEPARATE JUDGMENT SIGNED. JUDGE: ETHAN P. SCHULMAN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED (302/EPS)
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 66845120) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT DARUS, AMANDA L

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-17-2020 CONTINUED TO FEB-23-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK (USA), N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DARUS, AMANDA L $5,799.87 PRINCIPAL, $435.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,234.87, (NOTE: THE PRINCIPAL IS $8799.87 MINUS A $3000.00 CREDIT) - SEE SCANNED DOC -
